pagesCollection.label: Pages Collection
pagesCollection.help: The collection used for page metadata. The collection must have path and status fields. Change this if you use a custom schema that extends builder-page.

autoGenerate.label: Auto-Generate Stubs
autoGenerate.help: Automatically regenerate PHP stubs when pages are saved in the admin.

cleanOrphans.label: Clean Orphan Stubs
cleanOrphans.help: Remove generated stub files that no longer correspond to published pages during generation.
